overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's bustling downtown district at dusk. The character navigates busy sidewalks, crosses a major intersection with towering neon-lit skyscrapers, and enters a vibrant outdoor bar with purple neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown sidewalk with vending stalls

events.description: waiting at crosswalk as futuristic vehicles pass by

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past yellow vending stalls and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with backpack walking alongside the player character

entered.detail: bright yellow automated vending kiosk with illuminated advertisements
elevated highway or monorail track crossing above the street
tall cylindrical building covered in rotating neon advertisements and holograms
tall palm trees lining the street against the skyline

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a busy downtown sidewalk lined with yellow vending stalls and palm trees. The scene features a mix of natural dusk light and artificial neon from the towering circular building visible in the distance. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions as the character approaches a crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with towering skyscrapers

events.description: steps onto crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street
camera tilts upward to look up at the towering skyscrapers and neon signs

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a crosswalk then looking up at the towering buildings

notable_agents.action: futuristic white car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with prominent blue DATA INC signage
cylindrical building with multiple levels of rotating neon advertisements
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wide urban intersection surrounded by massive skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements. The camera tilts up to reveal the DATA INC tower and a distinctive circular building with multiple advertising screens. Futuristic vehicles drive through the intersection as the character reaches the other side.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with illuminated seating areas

events.description: enters open plaza area with blue illuminated benches after crossing the street
turns right to walk along the plaza pathway

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza past blue illuminated benches and other pedestrians

entered.detail: futuristic curved benches with bright blue neon underlighting
building facade with yellow overhang and metal shutters
concrete wall covered in colorful street art and graffiti

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open urban plaza featuring distinctive blue benches with neon lighting. The area has a mix of modern architecture and street art, with pedestrians scattered throughout. The character turns right and heads toward a narrower street with storefronts.

events.description: enters narrow alley with intense purple and pink neon lighting
approaches and walks up to the neon-lit bar counter

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow alley toward a vibrant neon-lit bar with purple and pink lighting

notable_agents.action: woman in colorful athletic outfit walking ahead toward the bar

entered.detail: outdoor bar counter with bright purple neon lighting and curved modern design
white industrial container with red graffiti art on the side
storefront entrance bathed in bright pink neon light

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow alleyway dominated by intense purple and pink neon lighting. The environment shifts from open plaza to enclosed street with graffiti-covered containers and a prominent neon bar. The character approaches the bar counter where other patrons are seated.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor neon bar with seating and city views

events.description: character sits down at the neon bar counter
camera pans around the bar area showing other patrons and the city background

agents.ego_description: sitting at the neon bar counter and looking around at other patrons and the cityscape

notable_agents.action: patron with bright red hair sitting at the bar drinking
bartender serving drinks behind the counter

entered.detail: futuristic bar stools with integrated neon lighting
red neon sign above the bar counter
illuminated screen displaying menu items behind the bar

segments.scene_description: The character sits at the curved neon bar with purple and red lighting, joining other patrons. The camera pans around to reveal the bartender serving drinks, other customers seated on neon stools, and the cityscape visible in the background. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with vibrant artificial lighting dominating the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling downtown district that transitions from an open urban thoroughfare into an intimate, neon-drenched bar. It begins on a busy sidewalk lined with yellow vending stalls and palm trees, moving past pedestrians toward a wide intersection where the camera tilts up to reveal massive skyscrapers and the glowing DATA INC tower. As the character crosses the street and enters an open plaza with blue neon benches, the environment shifts from the scale of towering architecture to a more grounded street level. The scene then narrows into a graffiti-covered alleyway dominated by intense purple and pink lighting before turning toward a vibrant outdoor bar. Finally, the camera pans around the curved counter to reveal the bartender and patrons seated on neon stools, with the distant cityscape framing the saturated artificial glow of the lounge.
